footer.tagline: Quality Products - Fast Delivery - Competitive Prices

express.title: Express Delivery
express.description: Delivery next business day. Order must be placed before 2 PM.

home.title: Home Delivery
home.description: Delivered to your door within 1-3 business days. You can choose delivery time.

pickup.title: Pick up from parcel locker
pickup.description: Pick up your order from the nearest parcel locker within 2-4 business days.

free.title: Free Shipping
free.description: Orders over 100 € delivered free to parcel locker.

tracking.title: Order Tracking
tracking.description: You will receive a tracking code by email as soon as your order has been shipped. You can track the shipment in real-time on the carrier's website.

areas.title: Delivery Areas
areas.description: We deliver throughout Finland. Special delivery conditions may apply to:

policy.title: 14-day right of return
policy.description: You have the right to return a product ordered from the online store within 14 days of receiving the product without explanation. The product must be unused and in its original packaging.

step1.title: Notify of return
step1.description: Send an email to returns@mallandmore.fi or call our customer service. Provide your order number and the product to be returned.

step2.title: Pack carefully
step2.description: Pack the product in its original packaging or in a similar protective packaging. Include a copy of the purchase receipt or order confirmation.

step3.title: Send package
step3.description: Deliver the package to the nearest post office or parcel locker. Keep the shipping receipt as proof of return.

step4.title: Get refund
step4.description: We process your return within 3-5 business days. Refund is paid back to the same account from which the payment was made.

costs.title: Return Costs
costs.defective: Free return for defective or incorrect products
costs.other: Other returns: customer pays return costs (approx. 5-10 €)

exchange.title: Exchange Product
exchange.description: If you want to exchange a product for another, we recommend returning the product and placing a new order in the online store. This way you can be sure that the product you want is available and you'll get it quickly.

exceptions.title: Right of Return Limitations
exceptions.description: The right of return does not apply to the following products:
exceptions.hygiene: Hygiene products that have been opened
exceptions.sealed: Sealed products that have been opened (e.g. software)

contact.title: Need help with return?
contact.description: Our customer service is happy to help with all return-related questions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions. If you don't find what you're looking for, contact our customer service.

howToOrder.q: How do I place an order?
howToOrder.a: Add desired products to cart and go to checkout. Fill in delivery and payment information and confirm order. You will receive an order confirmation by email.

changeOrder.q: Can I change my order after placing it?
changeOrder.a: If the order hasn't left our warehouse yet, we can make changes. Contact our customer service as soon as possible after placing the order.

cancelOrder.q: How can I cancel my order?
cancelOrder.a: You can cancel your order for free before it has been shipped. Contact our customer service by email or phone.

methods.q: What payment methods can I use?
methods.a: We accept all common bank and credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), online banking payments, and invoice for companies.

secure.a: Yes. We use SSL encryption and all payment transactions are processed securely through the payment service provider. We do not store your credit card information.

when.a: For card purchases, the charge occurs immediately after order confirmation. For invoice, the payment period is 14 days.

time.a: Normally 1-3 business days for in-stock items. Delivery time for order items is 5-10 business days. Estimated delivery time is shown on the product page.

cost.a: To parcel locker 3.90 €, home delivery 5.90 €. Orders over 100 € are delivered free to parcel locker.

track.a: Yes. You will receive a tracking code by email as soon as your order leaves our warehouse. You can track the shipment in real-time.

howTo.q: How can I return a product?
howTo.a: You have a 14-day right of return. Notify our customer service of the return, pack the product in its original packaging and send it to our return address.

costs.a: Returns of defective or incorrect products are free. In other cases, customer pays return costs (approx. 5-10 €). Orders over 100 €: free return.

refund.q: When will I get my money back?
refund.a: We process the return within 3-5 business days. Refund is paid to the same account from which the payment was made. Bank processing time is 2-5 business days.

warranty.a: All our products have at least 12 months warranty. Many manufacturers offer longer warranty. Warranty terms are stated on the product page.

defective.q: What do I do if a product is defective?
defective.a: Contact our customer service. We process complaints quickly and deliver a new product or refund the full payment.

genuine.a: Yes. All our products are genuine and we source them directly from manufacturers or authorized importers.

need.q: Do I need a user account to place an order?
need.a: No. You can also place an order as a guest. However, a user account makes it easier to track orders and speeds up checkout.

create.q: How do I create a user account?
create.a: Click the 'Register' button in the top corner and fill in the required information. You will receive a confirmation link by email.

forgot.q: I forgot my password. What should I do?
forgot.a: Click the 'Forgot password?' link on the login page. We will send password reset instructions to your email.

notFound.title: Didn't find an answer?
notFound.description: Our customer service is available weekdays 9-17

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: E-Commerce Platform was founded in 2010 with a simple mission: to make quality products accessible to everyone. Starting from a small warehouse in Helsinki, we have grown into one of Finland's leading online retailers.
story.p2: Today, we serve hundreds of thousands of satisfied customers and partner with thousands of suppliers to bring you the best selection of products at competitive prices.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We carefully select products from reliable suppliers to ensure the highest quality standards.

service.title: Customer Service
service.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. Our dedicated team is available to help you every weekday.

price.title: Best Prices
price.description: We work directly with suppliers to offer competitive prices without compromising on quality.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We are committed to environmentally responsible operations and sustainable business practices.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: We have a passionate team of professionals dedicated to providing the best shopping experience. From customer service to logistics, every member of our team plays a vital role in our success.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Environmental responsibility is important to us. We minimize waste, use eco-friendly packaging, and support renewable energy initiatives. We partner with suppliers who share our commitment to sustainability.

why.title: Why Join E-Commerce Platform?
why.description: We're looking for talented individuals who are passionate about delivering excellent customer service and innovative solutions. If you're excited about working in e-commerce and want to be part of a dynamic team, we'd love to hear from you.
why.benefits: Competitive salary, flexible working hours, professional development opportunities, and a supportive work environment.

positions.title: Open Positions
positions.noPositions: Currently no open positions. Check back soon!

customerService.title: Customer Service Representative
customerService.description: Help our customers with inquiries, orders, and returns. Must be fluent in Finnish and English.

logistics.title: Logistics Coordinator
logistics.description: Manage warehouse operations, order fulfillment, and shipping logistics.

developer.title: Full Stack Developer
developer.description: Help us build the next generation of our e-commerce platform using modern web technologies.

step1.title: 1. Submit Your Application
step1.description: Send your CV and a cover letter to careers@mallandmore.fi

step2.title: 2. Initial Review
step2.description: We review applications and contact suitable candidates for an interview.

step3.title: 3. Interview
step3.description: Participate in one or more interview rounds to discuss your qualifications and experience.

step4.title: 4. Offer
step4.description: If selected, we will extend an offer to join our team.

media.title: Media Contact
media.name: Press Relations
media.description: For media inquiries, interviews, and press materials, please contact our press office.

releases.title: Press Releases
releases.noReleases: No press releases available at the moment.

assets.title: Brand Assets
assets.description: Download our logos, brand guidelines, and product images for media use.

agreement.title: Agreement
agreement.description: These Terms of Service constitute a binding agreement between you ('User' or 'Customer') and E-Commerce Platform Ltd. ('Company'). By accessing and using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

usage.title: Acceptable Use
usage.description: You agree not to use the site for any unlawful purpose or in any way that violates these terms. Prohibited behavior includes:
usage.item1: Harassing or causing distress or inconvenience to any person
usage.item2: Disrupting the normal flow of dialogue within our website
usage.item3: Attempting to gain unauthorized access to our systems
usage.item5: Disrupting the normal flow of dialogue within our website

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property Rights
intellectualProperty.description: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of E-Commerce Platform Ltd or its content suppliers and is protected by international copyright laws.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.description: To the fullest extent permitted by law, E-Commerce Platform shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use the website or services.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.description: The website and its content are provided on an 'as is' basis without warranty of any kind. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or usefulness of any information on our website.

intro.title: Your Privacy Matters
intro.description: E-Commerce Platform Ltd ('we', 'us', or 'our') operates the website. This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data when you use our website and the choices you have associated with that data.

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.description: When you create an account or place an order, we collect information such as your name, email address, phone number, and billing/shipping address.

payment.title: Payment Information
payment.description: We do not store payment card details. Payment information is processed securely through our payment provider.

usage.title: Usage Data
usage.description: We automatically collect information about your interactions with our website, including IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent on the site.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our website and improve your experience.

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.item1: To provide and maintain our service
use.item2: To notify you about changes to our service
use.item3: To process orders and send related information
use.item5: To gather analysis or valuable information for improving our service
use.item6: To monitor the usage of our service

gdpr.title: GDPR Compliance
gdpr.description: We comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You also have the right to restrict processing or object to the processing of your data.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.description: We retain personal data for as long as necessary to provide our services and fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, unless a longer retention period is required by law.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact:

intro.title: We Use Cookies
intro.description: E-Commerce Platform uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, personalize content, and analyze website traffic.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core functionality such as security, user authentication, and compliance with legal requirements.

performance.title: Performance Cookies
performance.description: These cookies collect information about how you use our website, such as which pages you visit. They help us improve website performance and user experience.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies allow the website to remember choices you make, such as your language preference or login information, to provide a more personalized experience.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies are used to track your activity across websites to display targeted advertisements that are relevant to your interests.

preferences.title: Cookie Preferences
preferences.description: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to refuse cookies or alert you when cookies are being sent. Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of our website.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.description: We work with third-party services (such as analytics and advertising partners) that may set their own cookies on your device.

contact.title: Questions About Cookies?
contact.description: If you have questions about our cookie policy, please contact:
